THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACRITCHIE, DON DBA NEILSON & MACRITCHIE INVESTI - - GATORS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAUER, JEAN ANN ESQ. ROBERGE, RENEE A. ANDERSON, PHILIP KIRK ANDERSON, THOMAS A. CLEMENT L. GLYNN, ESQ. $5,360.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,435.00, DEFENDANT PHILIP KIRK ANDERSON, RENEE A. ROBERGE, AND CLEMENT L. GLYNN, ESQ ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. THE COURT FINDS AGAINST PLAINTIFF, AND FOR DEFENDANTS' SAND HILL RANCH AND P & S SPORTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE AND ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RECEIPT OF AMENDED PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT FILED BY JEAN ANN BAUER FILED.
